gist.headline: Spring cleaning the image API
gist.blurb: We've done some spring cleaning under the hood of our OpenAI-compatible image handlers. The code is now leaner, cleaner, and easier to maintain.
gist.summary: Refactored the OpenAI image handler routes to consolidate parameter resolution, response building, and authentication checks.
gist.impact: The core platform code is now more maintainable and easier for contributors to navigate, with zero changes to the external API behavior.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee cleaning up and organizing code blocks, representing the refactoring and simplification of the image handlers. The Nomnom creature eating the removed lines of code.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny bandana, sweeping up glowing lines of old code with a small broom. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats the swept-up code snippets. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
